# Phase 2 ‚Äî Models Content: SUMMARY

**One-liner:** 62 model content files (RU+EN) generated by 7 parallel agents, verified 62/62, wired into 144 prerendered routes (126 model HTML), pushed to prod with IndexNow ping ‚Äî plus a localization + UI hardening hotfix series.

## What shipped

### Core (Phase 2 plan: MODELS-B-1..6)
- **62 content files** (`src/content/models/<slug>.ts`, RU+EN) generated by 7 parallel general-purpose agents against the `gpt-image-2.ts` gold template.
- **Verification gate** `scripts/verify-models-content.mjs` ‚Äî 62/62 pass (intro words, description length, sections/examples/mistakes/faq counts, RU/EN parity, no Cyrillic in EN). 2 short RU descriptions hand-fixed.
- **Routes wired:** `slugs.ts` `MODEL_SLUGS_WITH_CONTENT` expanded 1‚Üí62; sitemap/llms floor 22‚Üí144. `seo-routes.ts` content filter now passes all 62. Build green: **144 routes**, **126 model HTML** (62 RU + 62 EN + 2 hubs), sitemap 144, llms.txt 144, FAQ-parity gate green.
- **Shipped:** 8 atomic commits (7 content batches + 1 infra wire) ‚Üí `main` (`a9b3a5c`). Vercel auto-deploy + IndexNow ping (144 URLs) on build.
- **Pre-push review:** Playwright (RU/EN render + hydration, 0 console errors, hreflang, schema graph) + Codex CLI code review (no critical findings).

### Post-Phase-2 hotfix series (2026-05-20)
- **EN meta localization** (`c867910`) ‚Äî `meta.name/platform/duration/resolution` are parsed verbatim from RU skill MDs, so 58/62 models leaked Russian onto `/en/*` (Quick Facts, related cards, hub, breadcrumb, SoftwareApplication schema). Added `metaEn.ts` EN overrides + `metaField` helper; wired through all render sites + seo-routes. Generator stays regen-safe. verify gate now fails on Cyrillic in EN meta.
- **EN head meta localization** (`6dbc26a`) ‚Äî `keywords`, `og:image:alt`, author byline were Russian on EN; `prerender.mjs applyMeta` now localizes them + transliterates the founder byline when `htmlLang === "en"`.
- **Hub redesign ‚Üí blog parity** (`7e55350`, `31cd086`, `dd35ee3`) ‚Äî `/models` got blog-style chip filters + right-aligned search (client `?q`, debounced), then a centered gradient hero matching the blog, heading shortened to "AI-–º–æ–¥–µ–ª–∏" / "AI models", blog hero gap halved (`md:min-h-[520px]` dropped).
- **Hydration fix** (`4d8c899` blog, in `7e55350` models) ‚Äî prerendered hub/blog emit the full unfiltered list, but the client filtered on first render from `?type`/`?tag`/`?q`/`?page` ‚Üí React #418/#425 on direct-load of a filtered URL. Gated URL-derived filters behind a post-mount `hydrated` flag so first client render matches SSR.
- **Seedance dedupe** (`3e93d56`) ‚Äî general `seedance` was named "Seedance 2.0" (collided with `seedance-2.0`); renamed to "Seedance (–æ–±—â–∏–π)"/"Seedance (general)" in skill MD + registry + metaEn.
- **Umbrella cards hidden** (`c543a6c`) ‚Äî 11 bare-brand "(General)"/"(–æ–±—â–∏–π)" models (flux, gpt-image, imagen, kling, luma-ray, midjourney, nano-banana, seedance, seedream, sora, veo) hidden from the hub grid + counts + ItemList schema via `HUB_HIDDEN_SLUGS`. Pages stay live, prerendered, in sitemap, and linked from related-models (not orphaned). Hub shows 51.

## Deviations from plan
- **D-12 commit batching honored** (7 content batches), but the verification + UI work that followed was not in the original Phase 2 plan ‚Äî it emerged from user review on prod and is recorded here as the Phase 2 hotfix series.
- **Codex MEDIUM (wire verify-models-content into build) deferred** ‚Äî the script does raw `.ts` dynamic import; needs confirmed Node ‚â•22.18 on Vercel before wiring. Tracked in STATE.md.

## Open / carried forward
- **MODELS-B-6** (‚â•60% URL Indexed in GSC, 7-14 days post-deploy ~2026-05-27..06-03) ‚Äî post-deploy monitoring window, the only requirement not yet verifiable at close.
- `/models/seedance` `<title>`/`<h1>` still "Seedance 2.0" (from content file, not meta) ‚Äî hidden page, low priority.

## Acceptance (Phase 2 spec)
1. `npm run build` green, 126 model HTML ‚Äî ‚úÖ
2. sitemap.xml ‚â•144 URL ‚Äî ‚úÖ (144)
3. llms.txt Models section all 62 + 2 hubs ‚Äî ‚úÖ
4. Rich Results / schema valid on sample models ‚Äî ‚úÖ (Playwright-verified graph)
5. IndexNow accepted ‚Äî ‚úÖ (fires on Vercel build)
6. ‚â•60% URL Indexed in 7-14 days ‚Äî ‚è≥ monitoring window (B-6)
